assertions.name: queue_table_present
assertions.description: Output contains formatted category table with Overdue, Due Today, Never Reviewed, Upcoming, Mastered counts

assertions.name: correct_total_count
assertions.description: Total tracked count matches actual number of eligible wiki notes (no no-review tags excluded)

assertions.name: priority_ordering
assertions.description: Ready for Review list follows priority: Overdue > Due Today > Never Reviewed

assertions.name: date_aware_categorization
assertions.description: Notes with next_review before 2026-03-14 are Overdue, equal to 2026-03-14 are Due Today

assertions.name: mode_prompt
assertions.description: Output ends with asking user to choose full or quick mode
